content: I will create the `walkthrough.md` file to summarize the changes made and the verification results.

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"walkthrough","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Walkthrough documenting the resolution of the Puja Page showing store items issue. Outlines the files updated, the logic changes, and TypeScript verification success."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Walkthrough - Puja Page Showing Store Items Fix

I resolved the issue where the Puja screen in the mobile app was showing store items (e.g., Rudrakshas from the `website_pooja_products` table) instead of general pujas (from the `general_poojas` table).

## Changes Made

### Mobile App Screens

#### [puja.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/(tabs)/puja.tsx)
- Redirected the `loadGeneralPoojas` database fetch to query the `general_poojas` table instead of `website_pooja_products`.
- Aligned column mapping for the `general_poojas` schema:
  - Title: `p.title`
  - Price: `p.offer_price`
  - Image: `p.image_url`
  - Tagline/description: `p.tagline`
  - Rating: `p.rating`
  - Reviews: `p.reviews`
  - Temple provider: `p.provider`
- Changed the realtime channel subscription (`generalSubscription`) to listen to Postgres changes on the `general_poojas` table.

#### [all_pujas.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/all_pujas.tsx)
- Updated `loadGeneralPoojas` to query `general_poojas` and updated its format mapping to match the schema.
- Updated the realtime channel subscription (`productsSubscription`) to listen to Postgres changes on the `general_poojas` table.

#### [puja_detail.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/puja_detail.tsx)
- Added `general_poojas` as the first fallback option under `loadPujaDetails`. If a puja is not found in `one_rupee_poojas`, it now checks `general_poojas` before querying `website_pooja_products` or `problem_poojas`.
- Since `general_poojas` uses the standard schema containing `title` rather than `name`, the dynamic layout mappings fall back correctly.

#### [settings_detail.tsx](file:///Applications/sahil_MP_app/APP/mantrapuja/app/settings_detail.tsx)
- Modified `fetchTempleCatalog` to fetch from both `general_poojas` (mapping `id` -> `temple`) and `website_pooja_products` (mapping `id` -> `temple_association`), merging them into the catalog. This ensures that both types of order items resolve thei
<truncated 228 bytes>
args.Description: "Creating walkthrough to summarize the Puja page query table correction"
